creator: raffaele.delorenzo@libero.it
text:
Hi,
there are no license issue for the ss5 application. If the "ss5.ha" file 
doesn't exist the ss5 server doesn't start with ambiguous error messages 
that can create confusion for the users.  I contacted the developer for 
this issue... for now the workaround is to create the file manually.

Regard

Raffaele
